name: Joyau Dore
desc2: Equip to increase Anomaly Agents' combat capabilities
phaseDescs: The equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>70</ct>. When the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct> deals <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>, the DMG dealt by their <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct> and <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>7%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill use. At 2 stacks, all squad members gain <ct color=#2BAD00>60</ct> Anomaly Proficiency. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

The equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>80</ct>. When the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct> deals <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>, the DMG dealt by their <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct> and <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>8%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill use. At 2 stacks, all squad members gain <ct color=#2BAD00>69</ct> Anomaly Proficiency. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

The equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>90</ct>. When the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct> deals <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>, the DMG dealt by their <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct> and <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>9%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill use. At 2 stacks, all squad members gain <ct color=#2BAD00>78</ct> Anomaly Proficiency. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

The equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>100</ct>. When the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct> deals <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>, the DMG dealt by their <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct> and <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>10%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill use. At 2 stacks, all squad members gain <ct color=#2BAD00>87</ct> Anomaly Proficiency. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

The equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>110</ct>. When the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct> deals <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>, the DMG dealt by their <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct> and <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>11%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill use. At 2 stacks, all squad members gain <ct color=#2BAD00>96</ct> Anomaly Proficiency. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.
